title: Dessert Spoons, 18/0 Stainless Steel, Cutlery 7.24 inches with Harley Pattern -Silver,Pack of 12
features: HIGH QUALITY & Luxurious-- Set of 12 dessert spoon, heavy duty and durable. Length: 7.24 inch. Great for everyday use, hotel, restaurant, entertaining, holiday meal and more
MIRROR POLISHING: Mirror polishing surface keeps the flatware shinning. This set made from sturdy, polished stainless steel, with comfortable, slimline pattern metal handles.

HIGH QUALITY-Offering casual flatware for a new business, elegant porcelain dinnerware for an upscale restaurant, and even traditional glassware for a bar, SUNSENGEUR Flatware is the name to trust for all of your tabletop needs. You won't have to sacrifice quality to meet your budget as they are determined to give you the best prices while still maintaining their excellent standards. SUNSENGEUR provides quality kitchen supplies that you can rely on to get the job done.
Dishwasher Safe - Always wash your Flatware in hot water and make sure you choose a cleaning agent free of abrasive or corrosive qualities that might damage your Flatware.

Handle Mature Design Process-Improved handle design for Comfortable Handing, absolutely not flimsy, Well designed to provide a good grip. Smooth edge, high-polish finished, will last for several years.The more graceful curve is only for you to enjoy life.
description: Welcome to SUNSENGEUR store: SUNSENGEUR , focus on the Stainless steel tableware, kitchenware products etc. We have 7 years of production experience, are actively building high quality and reasonable price products, if you have any question ,please contact us.
